checks.name: stage gates and pipeline assets present
command: from pathlib import Path; req=['PIPELINE.md','STAGE-GATES.md','scripts/sync_mcp_truth.py','methodology/core-principles.md','methodology/intent-anchoring.md','methodology/paradigms.md','methodology/responsibility-split.md','methodology/semi-finished-boundary.md','methodology/source-of-truth.md','sop/s0_requirement.md','sop/s1_data_inventory.md','sop/s2_routing_and_prd.md','sop/s3_html_design.md','sop/s4_review.md','sop/s5_skill_delivery.md','quality/overview.md','quality/G0_requirement.md','quality/G1_data_inventory.md','quality/G2_routing_and_prd.md','quality/G3_html_design.md','quality/G4_review.md','quality/G5_skill_delivery.md','mcp-capability-map/routing-decision-tree.md','references/antseer-components-standard.md','references/v2-writing-standard.md','scripts/sync_antseer_components.sh','scripts/self_test_frontend_sot.py','templates/requirement/intent-card.md','templates/s5/data-inventory-template.md','templates/s5/mcp-audit-template.md','templates/s5/data-prd-template.md','templates/s5/skill-prd-template.md','templates/s5/review-report-template.md','templates/s5/skeleton.html']; missing=[x for x in req if not Path(x).exists()]; assert not missing, 'missing gate/pipeline assets: '+', '.join(missing)

checks.name: raw scaffold intentionally fails until filled
command: import subprocess,tempfile,sys; from pathlib import Path; root=Path.cwd(); d=Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()); subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,'scripts/scaffold_shareable_skill.py',str(d),'--skill-name','tmp-skill','--display-name','Tmp Skill','--stage','requirement'], stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL); r=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-B','scripts/validate_shareable_skill.py',str(d),'--stage','requirement'], text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE); assert r.returncode != 0, 'raw requirement scaffold should fail until placeholders are filled'

checks.name: raw complete scaffold intentionally fails
command: import subprocess,tempfile,sys; from pathlib import Path; d=Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()); subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,'scripts/scaffold_shareable_skill.py',str(d),'--skill-name','tmp-complete-skill','--display-name','Tmp Complete Skill','--stage','complete'], stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL); r=subprocess.run([sys.executable,'-B','scripts/validate_shareable_skill.py',str(d),'--stage','complete'], text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE); out=r.stdout+r.stderr; assert r.returncode != 0, 'raw complete scaffold should fail until placeholders are filled'; assert 'Unresolved placeholders' in out or 'TODO' in out, out
